overall.description: A gameplay recording from GTA V showing a dusk drive through an urban industrial area in Los Santos. The camera moves steadily down a multi-lane street lined with neon-lit industrial buildings and overpasses, stopping at a red traffic light before proceeding through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial commercial street with elevated highway overhead

events.description: black SUV passes by on the left side of the road
slight acceleration while maintaining center lane position

agents.ego_description: driving steadily down the multi-lane industrial street, maintaining center lane position

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving in left lane, moving same direction as ego

entered.detail: large industrial structure with illuminated '06' signage and green neon accent lighting
massive concrete overpass structure with support pillars spanning across the street ahead
tall cylindrical industrial silo with metal framework and ladders
metal security fence running along the right sidewalk boundary
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the industrial building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dusk drive through an industrial urban corridor. The camera moves steadily forward past the large '06' industrial building on the left with its prominent digital billboards, while an elevated highway looms ahead. A black SUV passes on the left as the vehicle maintains a central lane position on the asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with traffic control signals

events.description: white vintage sedan overtakes on the right side and moves ahead
approaching red traffic light, beginning to slow down
comes to complete stop behind blue vintage car at red light

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a stop at the red traffic light behind a blue vintage sedan

notable_agents.action: white vintage sedan overtaking ego and proceeding ahead toward intersection
blue vintage car stopped at red traffic light directly ahead of ego

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal gantry with red lights illuminated
green street name sign reading 'Santa Rosa' mounted on traffic light pole
low-rise commercial structure with illuminated windows and signage on the right

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues toward the intersection as a white vintage car overtakes on the right. The traffic light structure and 'Santa Rosa' street sign become visible ahead. The camera slows and stops behind a blue vintage car waiting at the red light, with the industrial building still prominent on the left.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, allowing traffic to proceed
accelerating through the intersection and passing under the overpass

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the green light and driving under the elevated highway overpass

notable_agents.action: black sedan turning left at the intersection

entered.detail: the underside structure of the elevated highway forming a tunnel-like passage

segments.scene_description: Stopped at the red light, the vehicle waits until the signal turns green at 55 seconds. It then accelerates through the intersection, passing under the massive concrete overpass structure. The industrial building recedes into the distance on the left as the vehicle continues through the underpass and into the next block.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady drive through a dusk-lit industrial corridor that culminates in a passage under a massive concrete overpass. It begins moving forward past a large industrial building marked with a prominent 06 and digital billboards, while a black SUV glides past on the left. As the vehicle approaches an intersection, a white vintage car overtakes on the right before the camera slows to a halt behind a blue vintage car at a red light beneath a Santa Rosa street sign. Once the signal turns green, the vehicle accelerates forward, passing under the looming concrete structure of an elevated highway. The scene finally shifts as the industrial building recedes into the distance, leaving the camera to move through the underpass and into the next urban block.
